SESSION.NAME: defaultSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnostic session enables the default diagnostic session in the server(s) and does not support any diagnostic application timeout handling provisions (e.g., TesterPresent service is not necessary to keep the session active). A server shall always start the default diagnostic session when powered up. If no other diagnostic session is started, then the default diagnostic session shall be running as long as the server is powered.

SESSION.NAME: programmingSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnosticSession enables all diagnostic services required to support the memory programming of a server. Regardless of whether the programmingSession runs in boot software or not, the ECU shall automatically suspend logging of DTCs and suspend transmission of non-diagnostic frames when entering the programmingSession.

SESSION.NAME: extendedDiagnosticSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnosticSession is used to enable timed diagnostic service functionality (e.g., I/O control). The diagnostic functionality in this session shall also include all supported diagnostic functionality supported in the defaultSession.

DATA_FORMAT_IDENTIFIER.NAME: No Compression Method and No Encryption Method

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Metal Object on Pad with No Phone Present
Charging Not Successful Due to Metal Object
Phone Stopped Charging Due to Overheat
Phone Stops Charging Because of Loss of Efficiency
Pad Stops Charging Because PEPS Antenna Searching for PEPS Key
Eliminated AM Noise and Session Active
Reduced Phone Charging Power due to AM Band
OTA Initiate Download Function in Progress

ENUM_MEMBER.DESCRIPTION: One or More OTA Preconditions Not Met

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Ignition Off Time Required Prior to Accepting InitateActivation of New OTA Software

ENUM_MEMBER.DESCRIPTION: Validation Application Routine Not Executed This Session
OTA Over OVTP For Identification Only

Most Recent OTA FID Debug Info

2nd Most Recent OTA FID Debug Info

3rd Most Recent OTA FID Debug Info
4th Most Recent OTA FID Response Type
4th Most Recent OTA FID Debug Info

SUB_FIELD.NAME: In-Use Application Signing Public Key Hash

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Loop-Time overflow or scheduler idle time overflow Counter

SUB_FIELD.NAME: ECU Up Time From Ignition On or Wake-up

DID.NAME: External BUS Message Checksum Fault Counter

SUB_FIELD.NAME: External BUS Message Checksum Fault Counter
Phone as a key power mode support Enable/disable
Lost Comm with APIM DTC enable/disable
Lost Comm with Radio DTC enable/disable
Delta from CATA to WCM temp for Fmin

ENUM_MEMBER.DESCRIPTION: Authentication fail in certification chain validation

DID.NAME: TOTAL AMOUNT OF TIME IN A CHARGING CONTRACT

SUB_FIELD.NAME: TOTAL AMOUNT OF TIME IN A CHARGING CONTRACT

DID.NAME: Electronic Control Module Cooling Fan Performance Degraded

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Electronic Control Module Cooling Fan Performance Degraded
Boot Software Version Number- Main Version
Boot Software Version Number- Sub Version
Boot Software Version Number- Release Version

DID.NAME: Subsystem Specific Diagnostic Specification Part Number

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Subsystem Specific Diagnostic Specification Part Number

DID.NAME: NOS Bootloader Generation Tool Version Number

SUB_FIELD.NAME: NOS Bootloader Generation Tool Version Number

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: Operation cycle counter #2
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: Number of operation cycles since the DTC fault detection counter last reached its maximum value of +127 (since DTC information was last cleared). The operation cycles during which the test was not completed shall be excluded

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: DTC Fault Detection Counter
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: The purpose of this counter is to provide a mechanism for filtering the results of a low-level fault detection process so that test results (pass and fail) can be qualified before setting any DTC status bits.

DTC_OPERATION_CYCLES_SUPPORTED.DTC_OPERATION_CYCLE: Start : Operation Cycle starts when the operation of the WCM. End : Operation Cycle ends when the operation of the WCM.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Electronic Control Module Cooling Fan Circuit
Lost Communication With Body Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Voltage : Normal state 2. Ignition state : RUN(0x04) 3. PwPckTq_D_Stat != StartInPrgrss_TqNotAvail(0x2) 4. Not In programming session
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass : WCM receives 0x3B2 msg every its period 500 ms. Fail : If the message (0x3B2) is not received for more than 5 seconds. Missing (Initially there is a CAN message and then disappears)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: For unknown/missing or invalid signal values: disable charging feature unless HMI_HMIMode_St = ON or PrsnlDevcChrgEnbl_Rq = Active
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: 1. WCM may not enable charging when Ignition Status = RUN or if vehicle is in Accessory or Delayed Accessory Mode (if APIM does not provide HMI Power Mode CAN signal). 2. WCM may not enable charging to boost the battery of depleted mobile device battery. 3. WCM may not disable charging in transport mode. 4. WCM's PEPS Avoidance technique's backup may not function (primary mechanism is physical hardwire).

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Voltage : Normal state 2. Ignition state : RUN(0x04) 3. PwPckTq_D_Stat != StartInPrgrss_TqNotAvail(0x2) 4. Not In programming session
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass : WCM receives 0x2D5 and 0x1E6 and 0x2F5 msg every its period 1000ms. Fail : If the message (0x2D5 or 0x1E6 or 0x2F5) is not received for more than 5 seconds. Missing (Initially there is a CAN message and then disappears)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: For unknown/missing or invalid signals: no restriction to charging (charging may still be enabled if ignition_status = RUN/ACC, HMI_HMIMode_St = ON, etc). Note: AM Avoidance feature will not be active when these messages are missing.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Noise on tune radio station. Very low likelihood of occurance WCM would lose AM avoidance and AM seek feature.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Accessory Protocol Interface Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Voltage : Normal state 2. Ignition state : RUN(0x04) 3. PwPckTq_D_Stat != StartInPrgrss_TqNotAvail(0x2) 4. Not In programming session
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass : WCM receives 0x2E3 msg every its period 1000ms. Fail : If the message (0x2E3) is not received for more than 5 seconds. Missing (Initially there is a CAN message and then disappears)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: For unknown/missing or invalid signals: no restriction to charging (charging may still be enabled if ignition_status = RUN/ACC, delay_accy = ON etc).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: WCM may not enable charging when HMI Status = ON

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Voltage : Normal state 2. Ignition state : RUN(0x04) 3. PwPckTq_D_Stat != StartInPrgrss_TqNotAvail(0x2) 4. Not In programming session
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass : WCM is configured a diagnostic 0xDE00 - 0xDE04. Fail : WCM is not configured a diagnostic 0xDE00 - 0xDE04.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Voltage : Normal state 2. Ignition state : ACC(0x02) or RUN(0x04)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass : Checksum verification pass Fail : Checksum failure. Check when booting or wake from sleep and set DTC if Checksum error occurred. At build time, the CRC is updated in the image head._At boot time, the CRC in the image head is compared with the actual calculated CRC._If the value is different, DTC is set
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Disable charging (standby mode) until next sleep/wake cycle.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Voltage : Normal state 2. Ignition state : ACC(0x02) or RUN(0x04)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass : ECC is not occured. || 3-copied memory are not broken ( PFlash and EEPROM). Fail : DTC is set when a multi-bit error occurs or when all 3 copies of 3 copies of PFlash EOL Data and EEP EOL Data are broken.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Multi-bit error: Go to standby mode and disable charging. 3 of 3 copies broken: Restore WCM default values and set DTC, which will likely time out after 80 ignition cycles.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Voltage : Normal state 2. Ignition state : ACC(0x02) or RUN(0x04)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass : NTC, Coil connection is operated normally. Fail : NTC or Coil disconnection is occured.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: NTC or coil error -> disable charging (safety state).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Disabled charging feature(NTC or Coil failure)

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Ignition state : RUN(0x04) 2. PwPckTq_D_Stat != StartInPrgrss_TqNotAvail(0x2) 3. Not In programming session
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass : 9V <= voltage Fail : voltage value remains below 9V over 20 seconds.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. Ignition state : RUN(0x04) 2. PwPckTq_D_Stat != StartInPrgrss_TqNotAvail(0x2) 3. Not In programming session
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass : voltage <=16 Fail : voltage value remains above 16V over 20 seconds.

ROUTINE.NAME: Restore Initial ECU Configuration To Not Complete State

ENUM_MEMBER.DESCRIPTION: Valid Application Software is NOT Present
